nasb.text: Now Jericho was tightly shut because of the sons of Israel; no one went out and no one came in.

esv.text: Now Jericho was shut up inside and outside because of the people of Israel. None went out, and none came in.

cnv.text: 耶利哥的城門因以色列人的緣故，就緊緊地關閉，沒有人出入。

ccb.text: 耶利哥人害怕以色列人，就把所有的城门都关得紧紧的，无人出入。
